posts.title: What I’ve been building: ATOM Report, post-training course, finishing my book, and ongoing research
posts.author: Nathan Lambert
posts.highlights: The post offers a personal update on Nathan Lambert's multifaceted contributions to AI/ML, including the ATOM Report for technical insights, a post-training course for practical education, and his book for broader dissemination of knowledge. It highlights the importance of bridging research, education, and community engagement in advancing the field.
posts.worthReading: It provides a concise overview of current projects from an active researcher, useful for those interested in AI/ML trends, educational resources, or community contributions.
